meaning: v.结盟,与...(在血统,性质等上)有关联,同盟n.同盟国,支持者
examples: He is a close ally of the president.
He's stunned by today's resignation of his longtime ally.
Besides, with Jonathan's wild game to contain with, I would really welcome an ally.
Tennessee Congressman Zach Wamp is a close ally of Thompson and is pushing him to run.
The measures have also been ratified by Turkish President Abdullah Gul, Erdogan's AKP ally.
